Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0A40 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Hypa-Ball (J1).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $f500 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0980 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Hypa-Ball (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0980 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
